modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Microphone on Windows laptop is not functioning properly.

full_description_text: The user reported that the microphone on their laptop isn't working at all. They were trying to use it during a call but found it completely unresponsive. This issue seems to be specific to the Windows OS environment, and it’s causing some frustration during their live chat session.
short_description: Microphone on Windows laptop is not functioning properly.
description: The user reported that the microphone on their laptop isn't working at all. They were trying to use it during a call but found it completely unresponsive. This issue seems to be specific to the Windows OS environment, and it’s causing some frustration during their live chat session.
